name: Cabral Gold Inc.
summary: Cabral Gold Inc., a junior resource company, engages in the identification, exploration, and development of mineral properties with a primary focus on gold properties located in Brazil. The company principally holds 100% interests in the Cui√É¬∫ Cui√É¬∫ gold project covering an area of 41,576.08 hectares located in the Tapajos Region within the state of Para in northern Brazil. Cabral Gold Inc. is based in Vancouver, Canada.
